description: Northwind Analytics provides real-time operational analytics and observability for commerce teams. The platform monitors mission-critical flows (checkout, payments, fulfillment) and alerts teams to anomalies before they impact revenue.

products.name: Northwind Watchtower
products.description: Commerce observability for checkout, payments, and order flows with SLA tracking, incident timelines, and prebuilt dashboards. Includes connectors for Shopify, BigCommerce, and custom APIs.

products.name: Northwind Pulse
products.description: Real-time alerting and incident collaboration with anomaly detection, seasonal baselines, routing to on-call, and integrations with Slack and PagerDuty.

go_to_market.sales_motion: Direct sales with solutions engineering and partner-led co-selling
